title: Oath or Affirmation Required
text: Every witness before testifying shall take an oath or make an affirmation or declaration in the form provided by law, except that a child under the age of 10 or a dependent person with a substantial cognitive impairment, in the court's discretion, may be required only to promise to tell the truth.

source.editorial_note: Amended by Stats. 2004, Ch. 823, Sec. 3. Effective January 1, 2005.
